TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Isaetipan pahikukian ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,927 buwan, 5,066 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 25% kyan ku 1,247 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 75% kyan ku 3,819 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Pukpuk. tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga kiyumi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa pukpuk. taj ʔllaw na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa taraʦ~ʨan. taj ʔzil na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa kijumi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Isaetipan pahikukian ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,927 buwan, 5,066 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 25% kyan ku 1,247 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 75% kyan ku 3,819 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Pukpuk. tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga kiyumi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa pukpuk. taj ʔllaw na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa taraʦ~ʨan. taj ʔzil na is~ɕaetipan paħikukian ħjaʔ ɣa kijumi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
